title: MATANA 20 Premium Clear Plastic Dessert Plates with Gold Rim, 19cm / 7 Inch - Elegant & Reusable Small Side Plates, Starter Plates for Weddings, Birthdays, Picnic, Parties
features: Experience Elegance - Elevate the sophistication of your event with these transparent clear gold plastic plates featuring a stunning gold rim. These fancy reusable plates look remarkably realistic, enhancing any table with their elegant appearance.

Perfect for Small Party - Whether you're hosting an intimate gathering or a cozy celebration, this value pack of elegant party plates offers the perfect dining solution for your needs. Perfect for a variety of small dishes including appetizers, bread and butter, snacks, side dishes, cookies, pastries, and desserts like cakes, pies, and tarts. Ideal for tea or coffee time!

Fit In All Occasions - These gold rimmed plastic plates are perfect for weddings, bbq garden parties, Christmas parties, buffets and outdoor events. They're both elegant and durable, making them a perfect choice for any celebration or festivity. These plastic party plates are a must-have for any household, whether it's a children's party or a formal event.

Perfect for Any Dish - These heavy-duty plastic plates feature heat resistant, perfect for serving a variety of foods, from hors d'oeuvres starters to main courses, salads, cakes, desserts, and more. They're pretty and practical, making them perfect for any occasion.

Reusable - These plates are made from high-quality plastic, ensuring they're hard-wearing, sturdy, and durable, making them perfect for any occasion, They're designed to be gently washed and reused, ensuring you get the most out of them.
description: Elevate your next event with our premium clear dessert plates featuring an exquisite gold border and a unique hammered design. These 7.5 inch side plates offer a rustic, artisanal look that adds a touch of sophistication to any occasion. Perfectly sized for appetizers, bread and butter, snacks, side dishes, cookies, pastries, and a variety of desserts like cakes, pies, and tarts, these versatile plates are ideal for tea or coffee time. Whether you’re hosting a wedding, birthday party, celebration, buffet, catering event, or Christmas party, these elegant plates are designed to impress. Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free materials, our dessert plates are not only rigid and durable but also washable and reusable, making them an eco-friendly choice for your gatherings. Enjoy the convenience of premium tableware without the hassle of bulky, disposable options. Add a touch of elegance and practicality to your events with our premium clear dessert plates – the perfect blend of style and functionality for any celebration.
